title: Supplement
author: Mbarga Manga Joseph Arsene
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
S1 table. Bacterial strains used and their susceptibility profile to antibiotics. 

 S2 Fig. Main individual effect plot showing how the factors (percentage of ethanol, ratio m/v, and extraction time) influence the volume yield. 

 S3 Fig. Main individual effect plot showing how the factors (percentage of ethanol, ratio m/v, and extraction time) influence the mass yield. 

 S4 Fig. Main individual effect plot showing how the factors (percentage of ethanol, ratio m/v, and extraction time) influence the inhibition diameter of  S. aureus  ATCC 6538 

 S5 Fig. Interaction plot displaying how the relationship between the factors involved in the extraction process (percentage of ethanol, ratio m/v, and extraction time) influence the volume yield 

 S6 Fig. Interaction plot displaying how the relationship between the factors involved in the extraction process (percentage of ethanol, ratio m/v, and extraction time) influence the mass yield. 

 S7 Fig. Interaction plot displaying how the relationship between the factors involved in the extraction process (percentage of ethanol, ratio m/v, and extraction time) influence the inhibition diameter of  S. aureus  ATCC 6538 

 S8 Fig. Contour plot showing the evolution of the volume yield as a function of the ratio m/v and the percentage of ethanol. 

 S9 Fig. HPLC-MS/MS chromatogram of the optimized extract of Enantia chloranta bark 

 S10 table. Elemental composition of green synthesized AgNPs 

 S11 Fig. Particle size and distribution using photon cross correlation spectrometry 

 S12 Fig. Stability measurement of green-synthetized silver nanoparticles 

 S13 Fig. Survival rate of  Galleria mellonella  challenged with various concentrations of AgNPs
